value.characters: What kind of IT projects can I find through Staff-IT?

We offer a wide range of freelance IT projects, from software development, data and business intelligence, project management, and cybersecurity to infrastructure, cloud, and more. Our platform covers opportunities across the full IT spectrum — with projects running from Bruges to Genk and from Liège to Namur.

37:54513.name: Relevant IT projects in your inbox every day.
37:54513.characters:
Relevant IT projects 
in your inbox every day.

value.characters: What kind of IT projects can I find through Staff-IT?

We offer a wide range of freelance IT projects, from software development, data and business intelligence, project management, and cybersecurity to infrastructure, cloud, and more. Our platform covers opportunities across the full IT spectrum — with projects running from Bruges to Genk and from Liège to Namur.
Will my CV ever be shared with clients without my approval?

No. You are always in control. We will never forward your CV to a client without your explicit consent. First, you decide whether you want to be presented for an opportunity — only then do we share your profile.
How quickly will I see relevant projects after signing up?

Within 1 minute, our AI-matching shows you all the roles that best fit your profile in your personal dashboard. From that moment on, you’ll also receive one daily email with your top 5–10 most relevant projects — no spam, just opportunities that truly match your skills.No, creating an account on the Staff-IT platform is completely free. We only take our small daily margin once you are successfully placed at one of our clients. Until then, there are absolutely no costs for you as a freelancer.

We work with one of the lowest margins in the market — on average just 8% on top of your daily rate. We are always transparent about this, so you know exactly what the total rate will be. This ensures you stay comfortable with your earnings while we present you to clients as competitively as possible.

value.characters: What is the difference between a freelancer account and an agency account?

A freelancer account is designed for one person and allows you to upload a single CV. An agency account lets you upload as many CVs as you want for all your available consultants or freelancers, making sure your whole team receives their most relevant job matches every day.
